calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Aug-28-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment -Unlimited Civil Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Bleu Marketing Solutions Inc., a corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Amobee, Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defendant Bleu Marketing Solutions, Inc., a corporation.
Plaintiff's complaint for Money Due for Services Rendered was filed on May 16, 2018, and personally served on defendant Bleu Marketing Solutions, Inc.'s Agent for Process on April 4, 2019.
Default as to defendant Bleu Marketing Solutions Inc., a corporation, was entered on May 17, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 17, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 15, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Amobee, Inc., a corporation, and against the defaulted defendant Bleu Marketing Solutions Inc., a corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,150.35.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $584.00.

Total - $48,934.35.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2019 Continued To Jul-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
